$comment: THEME = adventure (Forest & trail). Brand-kit inputs only: a pine-green brand and four earthy accent hues (moss / clay / amber / berry mapped onto the teal / orange / pink / purple slots). Adventure OWNS ITS NEUTRALS per mode — see tokens/overrides/adventure.{light,dark}.json (sand paper in light, deep forest in dark). Shape and fonts match Confetti's defaults for now. Every brand-kit input must be defined here (the wiring under :root references them). Emitted under [data-theme='adventure'].

primary.comment: pine green — reads as text on sand (4.7:1) and as button fill with white (6.5:1)

shape.$comment: Rounded-SQUARE controls (radius.lg = 12px), not Confetti's full pills.

interaction.$comment: Adventure buttons do NOT lift — button-lift = rest (no move) and the hover shadow is dropped in the overrides (shadow.button-lift = none). Instead they get 10% brighter on hover.
